mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT SUBJECT FROM TODO_LIST WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}

SELECT t.SUBJECT, s.TOTAL_MINUTES, s.TOTAL FROM TODO_LIST t LEFT JOIN STUDY_TIMER s ON t.USER_ID = s.USER_ID AND t.SUBJECT = s.SUBJECT WHERE t.USER_ID = #{userId} GROUP BY t.SUBJECT, s.TOTAL_MINUTES, s.TOTAL
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO STUDY_TIMER t USING (SELECT #{userId} AS USER_ID, #{subject} AS SUBJECT FROM dual) s ON (t.USER_ID = s.USER_ID AND t.SUBJECT = s.SUBJECT) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET TOTAL_MINUTES = #{totalMinutes} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (USER_ID, SUBJECT, TOTAL_MINUTES, TOTAL) VALUES (#{userId}, #{subject}, #{totalMinutes}, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT TODO_ID, SUBJECT, CONTENT, DEADLINE, STATUS FROM TODO_LIST WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND DEADLINE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) ORDER BY DEADLINE ASC

SELECT t.SUBJECT, t.DEADLINE, s.TOTAL_MINUTES, s.TOTAL, t.STATUS FROM TODO_LIST t LEFT JOIN STUDY_TIMER s ON t.USER_ID = s.USER_ID AND t.SUBJECT = s.SUBJECT WHERE t.USER_ID = #{userId} AND t.DEADLINE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE)
ORDER BY t.DEADLINE ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STUDY_TIMER (USER_ID, SUBJECT, TOTAL_MINUTES) VALUES (#{userId}, #{subject}, #{totalMinutes})
mapper.update: UPDATE TODO_LIST SET STATUS = '완료' WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND SUBJECT = #{subject}
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(TOTAL), 0) FROM TODO_LIST WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
SELECT SUBJECT FROM TODO_LIST WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND DEADLINE >= SYSDATE

SELECT t.SUBJECT, s.TOTAL_MINUTES, s.TOTAL FROM TODO_LIST t LEFT JOIN STUDY_TIMER s ON t.USER_ID = s.USER_ID AND t.SUBJECT = s.SUBJECT WHERE t.USER_ID = #{userId} AND t.SUBJECT IN
#{subject}
